economic_ownership_map.label: Existing produced-water network enterprise value

required_reinvestment.treatment: explicit in driver model or included in the stated owner-cash conversion and component range

economic_ownership_map.evidence: 2026 adjusted EBITDA guidance is $425M-$465M. Values use $380M at 8x, $445M at 10x, and $500M at 12x.
economic_ownership_map.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Apply the production, contract, location, capital-intensity, ownership, timing, and realization adjustments described in _system/reviews/economic_value_comparable_audit_2026-07-15.md.
economic_ownership_map.falsifier: Utilization, incremental after-tax return on capital, or contract economics fall below the low-case assumptions.

economic_ownership_map.label: Net debt

required_reinvestment.treatment: explicit in driver model or included in the stated owner-cash conversion and component range

economic_ownership_map.evidence: March 2026 principal debt was $1.475B and cash was $50.7M.
economic_ownership_map.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Apply the production, contract, location, capital-intensity, ownership, timing, and realization adjustments described in _system/reviews/economic_value_comparable_audit_2026-07-15.md.
economic_ownership_map.falsifier: The obligation, financing claim, tax, or realization friction is materially larger than the low-case reserve.

economic_ownership_map.label: Speedway, Devon, and contracted growth beyond 2026
economic_ownership_map.ownership_claim: Speedway, Devon, and contracted projects beyond 2026

required_reinvestment.treatment: explicit in driver model or included in the stated owner-cash conversion and component range

economic_ownership_map.evidence: 2026 capex guidance is $430M-$490M and includes Speedway plus projects supporting a Devon agreement beginning in 2027.

probability_and_timing.timing_basis: Discounting, realization friction, and the component assumptions reflect the time required to contract, develop, or monetize the claim.
probability_and_timing.probability_basis: The component low/base/high range or milestone driver explicitly risks realization; uncertainty widens the range rather than creating a zero.
probability_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: Remaining owner-funded capital is deducted in the driver where disclosed; otherwise the range and realization reserve reflect the unresolved capital burden.

economic_ownership_map.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Apply the production, contract, location, capital-intensity, ownership, timing, and realization adjustments described in _system/reviews/economic_value_comparable_audit_2026-07-15.md.
economic_ownership_map.falsifier: The next decision milestone fails, remaining capital rises materially, or the stated success probability no longer fits observable progress.

economic_ownership_map.label: Growth-capex execution reserve

required_reinvestment.treatment: explicit in driver model or included in the stated owner-cash conversion and component range

economic_ownership_map.evidence: Reserve for cost overruns, delayed in-service dates, and returns below the cost of capital on the $430M-$490M program.
economic_ownership_map.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Apply the production, contract, location, capital-intensity, ownership, timing, and realization adjustments described in _system/reviews/economic_value_comparable_audit_2026-07-15.md.
economic_ownership_map.falsifier: The obligation, financing claim, tax, or realization friction is materially larger than the low-case reserve.

economic_ownership_map.label: Network replacement-cost cross-check

required_reinvestment.treatment: explicit in driver model or included in the stated owner-cash conversion and component range

economic_ownership_map.evidence: Pipelines, disposal capacity, rights-of-way, and permits provide an embedded asset floor but are already monetized by the core network.
economic_ownership_map.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Apply the production, contract, location, capital-intensity, ownership, timing, and realization adjustments described in _system/reviews/economic_value_comparable_audit_2026-07-15.md.
economic_ownership_map.falsifier: Utilization, incremental after-tax return on capital, or contract economics fall below the low-case assumptions.

method_route.label: Predictable cash-flow security
failure_modes: contract renewal or regulatory reset ignored
method_route.decision_rule: Power Zones select the fitting economic method and eligible independent reviewers; they never choose the valuation answer or capital decision.

scenario_contract.rule: Cases must change causal operating, capital, probability, timing, or financing drivers—not only the terminal multiple.

top_value_drivers.label: Speedway, Devon, and contracted growth beyond 2026

blockers: contract_quality: How protected are price, volume, duration, and capital recovery under customer contracts?
project_cohort_roic: What cash return has each major project cohort earned on total installed capital?
refinancing_and_funding: Can growth be funded through a stress case without diluting equity value?

falsifiers: Utilization, incremental after-tax return on capital, or contract economics fall below the low-case assumptions.
The obligation, financing claim, tax, or realization friction is materially larger than the low-case reserve.
The next decision milestone fails, remaining capital rises materially, or the stated success probability no longer fits observable progress.
The obligation, financing claim, tax, or realization friction is materially larger than the low-case reserve.
Utilization, incremental after-tax return on capital, or contract economics fall below the low-case assumptions.
required_refresh_triggers: new filing or material operating update

decision_rule: No security is decision-grade until every material economic claim is valued exactly once and every material evidence blocker is resolved.
cohort_purpose: Contracted infrastructure, project-cohort returns, leverage, and funding.
